This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] stroked zero-width rect: not rendered, fill bbox is all zeros
  assert_equals: x expected 0 but got 10
[FAIL] stroked zero-height rect: not rendered, fill bbox is all zeros
  assert_equals: x expected 0 but got 10
[FAIL] stroked zero-dim rect: not rendered, fill bbox is all zeros
  assert_equals: x expected 0 but got 10
[FAIL] stroked zero-radius circle: not rendered, fill bbox is all zeros
  assert_equals: x expected 0 but got 10
[FAIL] stroked zero-width rect: not rendered, stroke bbox is all zeros
  assert_equals: x expected 0 but got 10
[FAIL] stroked zero-height rect: not rendered, stroke bbox is all zeros
  assert_equals: x expected 0 but got 10
[FAIL] stroked zero-dim rect: not rendered, stroke bbox is all zeros
  assert_equals: x expected 0 but got 10
[FAIL] stroked zero-radius circle: not rendered, stroke bbox is all zeros
  assert_equals: x expected 0 but got 10
[FAIL] stroked ellipse with zero rx: not rendered, stroke bbox is all zeros
  assert_equals: x expected 0 but got 10
[FAIL] zero-length line with fill:false stroke:false returns empty bbox
  assert_equals: x expected 0 but got 10
Harness: the test ran to completion.
